channel.title: ramnes/awesome-mongodb Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: ramnes/awesome-mongodb Sep 19th, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

Python

  • PyMongoExplainstars3 - A wrapper for PyMongo's Collection object that makes it easy to run explain on your queries.

item.title: ramnes/awesome-mongodb Oct 2nd, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

C#/.NET

  • mongo-queue-csharpstars2 - C# message queue on top of MongoDB

    • Libraries

    Java

  • mongoFSstars20 - An enhancement of GridFS to allow for more features and capabilities
  • Spring Data MongoDBstars1.4k - Spring based, object-document support and repositories

    • Libraries

    JavaScript

  • MEAN.JSstars4.9k - Full stack based on MongoDB, Express, AngularJS, and Node.js
  • MERN (mern-starter)stars5.2k - Full stack based on MongoDB, Express, React and Node.js
  • Meteorstars43.1k - Real-time/reactive client-server framework based on MongoDB, with lots of features

    • Libraries

    Julia

  • Mongo.jlstars28 - C driver bindings

    • Libraries

    Python

  • MongoEnginestars3.9k - ODM on top of PyMongo

    • Libraries

    R

  • mongolitestars271 - Fast and simple client for R

    • Libraries

    Ruby

  • Mongoidstars3.9k - ODM framework

    • Tools

    Administration

  • MongoDB Smasherstars31 - Generate randomized datasets and benchmark your setup
  • mtoolsstars1.8k - Collection of scripts to set up test environments and visualize log files
  • nginx-gridfsstars800 - Nginx module for serving files from GridFS
  • nginx-mongodb-reststars30 - REST client written as an Nginx module

    • Tools

    Data

  • mongo-hadoopstars1.5k - Hadoop connector

    • Tools

    Deployment

  • Helm Chart

    • Tools

    Desktop

  • dbKoda - Cross-platform and open-source IDE
  • Mongotron - Cross-platform and open-source client built with Electron
  • NoSQLBooster - Feature-rich but easy-to-use cross-platform IDE (formerly MongoBooster)
  • Robo 3Tstars9k - Free, native and cross-platform shell-centric GUI (formerly Robomongo)
  • Studio 3T - Cross-platform GUI, stable and powerful (formerly MongoChef)

    • Tools

    Development

  • mgodatagenstars279 - Random data generator
  • Mongo Playground - Online query playground
  • Mongo Seedingstars486 - Node.js library, CLI and Docker image for populating databases using JS and JSON files
  • Mongoeyestars147 - Schema and data analyzer: explore data in your collections
  • Varietystars1.6k - Schema analyzer: see what fields are in your collection and what's their content

    • Tools

    Monitoring

  • Percona Monitoring and Management - Free and open-source platform for managing and monitoring databases performances

    • Tools

    Web

  • mongo-expressstars4.8k - Web-based admin interface built with Express
  • mongoadminstars250 - Admin interface built with Django
  • mongristars74 - Web-based user interface written in JavaScript

    • Applications

  • Countlystars5k - Mobile & web analytics and marketing platform built with Node.js
  • Leanotestars11k - Evernote clone built with Go
  • NodeBBstars13k - Node.js based forum software ("built for the modern web")
  • Reactionstars11.8k - Event-driven, real-time commerce platform built with ES6
  • SaaS Boilerplatestars3.2k - Boilerplate for SaaS products, built with TypeScript, React and Express
  • uptimestars3.6k - Remote monitoring application built with Node.js and Bootstrap

item.title: ramnes/awesome-mongodb Feb 22nd, 2016
item.description:
Libraries

PHP

  • laravel-mongodbstars6.2k - Eloquent model and query builder for Laravel
  • Doctrine MongoDBstars444 - Wrapper around the native PHP Mongo PECL extension to provide additional functionality
  • pecl/mongodbstars790 - Official PHP driver

    • Libraries

    Haskell

  • mongodbstars159 - Community Haskell driver

    • Libraries

    JavaScript

  • Moonridgestars65 - Framework with live querying on top of Mongoose and socket.io
  • Mongoosestars24.9k - Node.js asynchronous ODM
  • node-mongodb-nativestars9.6k - Official Node.js driver

    • Tools

    Deployment

  • ansible-role-mongodbstars324 - Ansible role
  • chef-mongodbstars366 - Chef cookbook
  • Dockerfilestars314

    • Resources

    Articles

  • Five Things About Scaling MongoDB (A. Jesse Jiryu Davis, MongoDB Inc.) - Scale 101
  • Server Discovery And Monitoring In PyMongo, Perl, And C (A. Jesse Jiryu Davis, MongoDB Inc.)

    • Resources

    Talks

  • MongoDB Schema Design (Tugdual Grall, MongoDB Inc.) [47']
  • Partial and Fuzzy Matching with MongoDB (John Page, MongoDB Inc.) [35']
  • Scaling MongoDB on Amazon Web Services (Michael Saffitz, Apptentive) [50']

    • Resources

    More

  • MongoDB source codestars22.6k
  • MongoDB University - Certifications and free online courses

    • Libraries

    C

  • mongo-c-driverstars744 - Official C driver

    • Libraries

    C++

  • mongo-cxx-driverstars914 - Official C++ driver

    • Libraries

    C#/.NET

  • mongo-csharp-driverstars2.9k - Official C# driver
  • MongoDB Messagingstars56 - Lightweight queue pub/sub processing library
  • MongoRepositorystars305 - Repository abstraction layer on top of the C# driver

    • Libraries

    Erlang

  • mongodb-erlangstars327 - Community Erlang driver

    • Libraries

    Java

  • Jongostars573 - Query in Java as in Mongo shell
  • Hibernate OGMstars313 - The power and simplicity of JPA for NoSQL datastores
  • mongo-java-driverstars2.5k - Official Java driver
  • Mongojackstars257 - Based on Jackson, allows you to easily handle your mongo objects as POJOs
  • Morphiumstars52 - Java ODM and caching layer
  • Mungbeanstars20 - Community driver for languages running on the JVM

    • Libraries

    Lisp

  • cl-mongostars134 - Community Common Lisp interface
  • mongo-cl-driverstars35 Community Common Lisp driver

    • Libraries

    Python

  • MongoLogstars133 - MongoDB logging handler
  • PyMongostars3.7k - Official (and recommended) Python driver
  • scrapy-mongodbstars349 - MongoDB pipeline for Scrapy

    • Libraries

    Ruby

  • mongo-ruby-driverstars1.4k - Official Ruby driver

    • Libraries

    Scala

  • mongo-scala-driverstars289 - Official Scala driver
  • ReactiveMongostars834 - Non-blocking Scala driver

    • Tools

    Administration

  • mongoctlstars177 - Manage MongoDB servers and replica sets using JSON configurations

    • Tools

    Monitoring

  • mongo-muninstars148 - Collection of Munin plugins
  • mongomonstars23 - More Munin plugins
